objectives: Understand fundamental Python syntax and data types.
Write basic Python scripts for simple tasks.
Learn about variables, operators, and control flow in Python.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Python Programming

objectives: Grasp core JavaScript concepts like variables, data types, and operators.
Implement basic DOM manipulation.
Understand event handling in JavaScript.
learning_path.title: JavaScript Fundamentals for Web Development

objectives: Understand the core concepts of object-oriented programming.
Learn to model real-world problems using classes and objects.
Explore concepts like encapsulation, inheritance, and polymorphism.
learning_path.title: Object-Oriented Modeling Principles

objectives: Learn the basic syntax and structure of Java.
Write and compile simple Java programs.
Understand fundamental Java concepts like classes, objects, and methods.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Java Programming

objectives: Explore the syntax and features of the Ruby programming language.
Write simple Ruby scripts.
Understand Ruby's approach to objects and blocks.
learning_path.title: Getting Started with Ruby Programming

objectives: Understand the challenges and best practices for data migration.
Learn different approaches to migrating existing data.
Plan and execute a basic data migration task.
learning_path.title: Data Migration Strategies and Techniques

objectives: Understand the benefits of using TypeScript.
Learn TypeScript's type system and basic syntax.
Convert existing JavaScript code to TypeScript.
learning_path.title: Introduction to TypeScript for JavaScript Developers

objectives: Learn the basic syntax and constructs of Perl.
Write simple scripts for text processing and system administration.
Understand Perl's regular expressions.
learning_path.title: Programming Fundamentals with Perl

objectives: Understand the core concepts of Erlang's concurrency model.
Write basic Erlang programs for distributed systems.
Learn about processes and message passing in Erlang.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Erlang for Concurrent Programming

objectives: Learn the basics of the R programming language.
Perform basic statistical operations and data manipulation in R.
Create simple data visualizations using R.
learning_path.title: Programming with R for Statistical Analysis

objectives: Understand the syntax and features of Groovy.
Write simple Groovy scripts.
Explore Groovy's integration with the Java Virtual Machine.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Groovy for JVM Development

objectives: Understand the declarative nature of Prolog.
Write simple Prolog programs using facts and rules.
Learn about backtracking and unification in Prolog.
learning_path.title: Fundamentals of Prolog Programming

objectives: Understand the fundamental concepts of assembly language.
Write simple assembly programs for a specific architecture.
Learn about registers, memory addressing, and basic instructions.
learning_path.title: Introduction to Assembly Language Programming

objectives: Explore the pure object-oriented paradigm of Smalltalk.
Write Smalltalk programs using its message-passing model.
Understand Smalltalk's development environment.
learning_path.title: Object-Oriented Programming with Smalltalk

objectives: Understand common programming paradigms.
Learn about algorithms and data structures.
Discuss general software development best practices.
learning_path.title: General Programming Concepts and Best Practices

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
